data.body:
## Unit Test Exemption: documentation files (no behavioral code)

All three criteria met: (1) no conditional logic — documentation only, (2) any test would be change-detector, (3) infrastructure-boundary — doc files only.

## Implementation
- Review SKILL.md Step 6.5 end-to-end: ensure auto-resolution flow (ACLI, credentials, identity, env ID, fallback) is accurately documented after all other stories complete
- Remove or update manual prompt references for ACLI_VERSION, ACLI_SHA256, BRIDGE_ENV_ID, BRIDGE_BOT_*
- Update CLAUDE.md architecture section if Jira bridge setup process is referenced
- Update ADR 0001-outbound-jira-bridge.md if it references manual setup flow
- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting

## Files
- EDIT: plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md (final review pass)
- EDIT: CLAUDE.md (if Jira bridge referenced)
- EDIT: plugins/dso/docs/adr/0001-outbound-jira-bridge.md (if manual flow referenced)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No documentation references old manual-prompt flow for ACLI_VERSION, ACLI_SHA256, BRIDGE_ENV_ID
  Verify: { grep -l 'ACLI_VERSION.*AskUserQuestion\|ACLI_SHA256.*AskUserQuestion\|BRIDGE_ENV_ID.*AskUserQuestion' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] Project-setup SKILL.md Step 6.5 references all helper scripts
  Verify: grep -q 'acli-version-resolver.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md && grep -q 'gh-identity-resolver.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md && grep -q 'jira-credential-helper.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md && grep -q 'gh-availability-check.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md
